ablation_spice.purpose: Quantify the contribution of each framework module (Expert/Shield/Metric/Iteration) to generating simulatable SPICE
prompts: Design a filter circuit with a cutoff frequency of 600Hz
Design a single-transistor common-emitter amplifier circuit with an AC gain of 40dB
Design a shunt regulator circuit based on a Zener diode with 5V output
Design an LED constant-current driver circuit with 20mA current

groups.G2_No_Shield: Remove topology shield (no cleaning of LLM output)
groups.G3_No_Metric: Use hard threshold judgment (no LLM judgment call)

method_flow: 5) If not passed, iterate based on feedback (max 8 rounds, G4 set to 1 round)

key_code_snippets.name: Core run loop (pseudocode)
key_code_snippets.code: plan = planner.generate_plan(prompt) -> inspect_components(plan) -> for iter in 1..max: spice = netlist_engine.generate_spice(...); passed, feedback = spice_engine.evaluate(...); if passed: break; else continue

key_code_snippets.name: NoShieldNetlistEngine (key points)
key_code_snippets.code: Skip expert.clean_spice_code() and global duplicate component name cleaning; feed raw LLM SPICE directly into Ngspice to test topology hallucination effects.

ablation_real.purpose: Ablate the effects of CoT/JSON/PRM/Exact-match in a real planner + retriever framework
ablation_real.test_cases: See script TEST_CASES (10 test cases, including LED, audio amplifier, LM7805, STC89C52, etc.)
method_flow: Repeat NUM_RUNS times for each test_case (script default NUM_RUNS=3)
Each call to CircuitPlannerFinal.generate_plan (affected by prompt template/CoT)
Use IntelligentRetriever to search components.search_query and calculate metrics
Calculate mean and variance by group, output Markdown report and result JSON/MD

key_code_snippets.name: calculate_all_metrics
key_code_snippets.code: Single retrieval for components, calculate rhr, recall, retrieval_quality to avoid duplicate retrieval. Implemented in script for result statistics.

key_code_snippets.name: AblationPlanner.generate_plan
key_code_snippets.code: Wraps CircuitPlannerFinal and can toggle use_prm_selection / system_prompt (for ablation).

model_comparison.purpose: Compare performance of multiple large models on circuit planning tasks (Qwen, DeepSeek, Kimi, GPT, Gemini, GLM, etc.)
model_comparison.models: See script MODELS list (includes model_name, API key, base_url)
method_flow: Inject model configuration for each model (modify planner_module.MODEL_NAME/API_KEY/BASE_URL)
Run several times on TEST_CASES, calculate average metrics and save result.json

key_code_snippets.name: ModelComparisonPlanner (key points)
key_code_snippets.code: Switch models by monkey-patching planner_module global variables, then create CircuitPlannerFinal instance for evaluation.

orchestrator_end2end.notes: MAX_ITERATIONS=8; if passed, call translate_to_json and generate KiCad schematic.

netlist_generator.purpose: Constrain LLM to generate SPICE satisfying topology/template, and auto-clean LLM output
key_strategies: Provide uid_hint (component UIDs that must be used) and explicit SPICE templates
First round provides strict template; subsequent rounds only allow parameter adjustment without changing topology
Post-processing removes prohibited components (e.g. R3, R_feedback), deduplicates decoupling capacitors, etc.
netlist_generator.example_snippet:
System prompt includes template and prohibited list:
'Only use R1, R2, C1, C2; do not add R3'; post-processing will remove matching prohibited patterns.

spice_engine_and_critic.purpose: Build Ngspice testbench, inject models, run simulation and parse output; synchronously call LLM judgment or use hard threshold
key_behaviors: Select analysis type based on circuit_type (AC/TRAN/MIXED) and write control block
Read wrdata files and parse x/y data; expert parses into metrics (cutoff_freq, max_gain, output_voltage, ripple, etc.)
Judgment: call LLM returning JSON {passed, reason, feedback}; G3 can be replaced with hard threshold judgment
spice_engine_and_critic.control_block_examples:
AC: .control
ac dec 50 f_start f_end
wrdata out.txt vdb(OUT)
quit
.endc
spice_engine_and_critic.metric_parsing_notes: Cutoff frequency calculated by -3dB search (linear interpolation); if beyond simulation range, use upper limit instead.

common_prompts_and_templates.llm_netlist_template: System prompt example: mandatory template + prohibited list (see netlist_generator.py for example), and list uid_hint in user_prompt.
common_prompts_and_templates.llm_judge_template: System prompt example: requires output JSON: {"passed": true/false, "reason": "...", "feedback": "..."}

usage_instructions.how_to_use_with_gpt: Use this JSON as context for GPT: for each experiment entry, directly use 'purpose', 'method_flow', 'metrics', 'key_code_snippets' to generate the Methods and Results sections of a paper; fill example_result_placeholders into table placeholders; use the scripts field to locate source code for extracting more code snippets.
usage_instructions.notes: If you need to expand the full function body of a file or add real run results (values from CSV/JSON), please let us know which file to expand or provide the path to the run results.
